name: forescout
explanation: Forescout is a logs-only vendor tile. The spec defines no `instances` block at all, only a `logs` template that expects the user to configure a syslog `tcp`/`udp` listener `port` on the Agent (the Forescout Syslog plugin must be installed and pointed at this port). There is no Agent metric check, no Python check class, and no upstream service to probe — Forescout pushes syslog into the Agent rather than the Agent pulling. The integration's value is the log pipeline plus dashboards; auto-config in the network-probe sense does not apply.
notes: Pattern N (logs-only / vendor syslog tile). No check.py exists under datadog_checks/forescout/.
